changeSet.author: hr-dev
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE APPLICATION ( ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT PK_APPLICATION PRIMARY KEY, APP_REF_NO VARCHAR2(20) CONSTRAINT NN_APP_REF_NO NOT NULL, CANDIDATE_ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT NN_APP_CAND_ID NOT NULL, JOB_POSTING_ID NUMBER CONSTRAINT NN_APP_JOB_ID NOT NULL, STATUS VARCHAR2(30) DEFAULT 'APPLIED' CONSTRAINT NN_APP_STATUS NOT NULL, SCORE NUMBER(5,2), SCORE_REASON VARCHAR2(2000), APPLIED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP CONSTRAINT NN_APP_APPLIED_AT NOT NULL, UPDATED_AT TIMESTAMP DEFAULT SYSTIMESTAMP, CONSTRAINT UQ_APP_REF_NO UNIQUE (APP_REF_NO), CONSTRAINT UQ_APP_CANDIDATE_JOB UNIQUE (CANDIDATE_ID, JOB_POSTING_ID), CONSTRAINT FK_APP_CANDIDATE FOREIGN KEY (CANDIDATE_ID) REFERENCES CANDIDATE (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT FK_APP_JOB_POSTING FOREIGN KEY (JOB_POSTING_ID) REFERENCES JOB_POSTING (ID) ON DELETE CASCADE, CONSTRAINT CHK_APP_STATUS CHECK (STATUS IN ( 'APPLIED','CV_REVIEWED','SHORTLISTED', 'INTERVIEW_SCHEDULED','INTERVIEW_DONE', 'OFFER_SENT','HIRED','REJECTED')) )
CREATE INDEX IDX_APP_SCORE ON APPLICATION (SCORE DESC)
